history.statement: Demand conversion should improve by the second half and support better revenue momentum next quarter.
history.actual_text: Revenue growth improved modestly in the subsequent quarter.

history.statement: Margins should hold despite wage revisions.
history.actual_text: Margins slipped slightly, making the guidance only partially delivered.

history.statement: Large-deal execution should support stronger book-to-bill conversion in the next quarter.
history.actual_text: Execution improved and bookings translated into healthier conversion.
